title: Soft Neon Rainbow Ball - 45cm Large Rubber Playground Football, Sensory Playtime Experience, Beach Outdoor Fun, Garden Games, Easy to Inflate, Develop Fine Motor Skills
features: Bright & Colourful Design – Eye-catching neon rainbow colours for added excitement, making it easy to spot during play
Large 45cm Size – Ideal for kicking, throwing, and interactive outdoor play, providing endless fun for kids and adults alike
Soft & Safe Material – Made from durable rubber for a comfortable grip and gentle play, ensuring safety while being tough enough for outdoor use
Supports Motor Skill Development – Great for improving coordination and movement, helping to enhance balance, agility, and teamwork skills

Included in This Package - In this package you will receive a brilliant neon rainbow ball, which can be used in a wide variety of fun and games either indoors or outdoors. The ball comes deflated and once inflated measures approximately 45cm in size, making it easy to handle and hold. Please Note: This product is not suitable for children under the age of 3
